nodes.label: Mots.js Multiplayer Crossword Game
nodes.rationale: A Node.js-based multiplayer crossword (mots fléchés) game supporting up to 9 players, with grids fetched from the GSO provider at rcijeux.fr. Designed for desktop play, real-time via Socket.IO.

nodes.label: Bonus Points System
nodes.rationale: Four bonus types: Preum's (+4, first word), Finish him (+4, last word), Débloqueur (+5, first word after 2min inactivity), Gros mot (+3, word ≥6 letters). Adds competitive incentive beyond raw letter count.

nodes.label: ABeeZee Font Family
nodes.rationale: Rounded, friendly sans-serif typeface used for the game UI. Two weights provided: regular (primary text) and italic. Units-per-em 2048, ascent 1638, descent -410.

nodes.label: IcoMoon Icon Set
nodes.rationale: Custom icon font generated by IcoMoon tool. Contains directional arrow icons (right, down, combinations) used to render crossword cell direction indicators, plus a tag/label icon and a checkmark circle icon. Units-per-em 512.

nodes.label: Green Background (green-bg.png)
nodes.description: Solid teal/muted green UI panel background with subtle low-poly geometric triangle texture. Used as a colored background for game UI panels.

nodes.label: Grey-White Background (grey-bg.png)
nodes.description: Near-white/very light grey UI panel background with faint low-poly geometric triangle texture. Used as a neutral background for game UI panels.

nodes.label: Grey Polygon Background (grey.png)
nodes.description: Medium grey UI background with a clearly visible low-poly geometric polygon/triangle faceted pattern. Larger and more prominent facets than grey-bg. Used as a textured grey background for game UI.

nodes.label: Pink Background (pink-bg.png)
nodes.description: Soft pink UI panel background with subtle low-poly geometric triangle texture. Used as a colored background for game UI panels.

nodes.label: Monster 1 Avatar (Teal Cat)
nodes.description: Cute cartoon teal/mint-green cat character with round body, small ears, tail, standing upright with one hand raised to its head in a thoughtful or saluting pose. Friendly, kawaii style.

nodes.label: Monster 2 Avatar (Pink Tentacle Monster)
nodes.description: Dark pink/magenta monster with a round head, wide grinning mouth, and long dangling tentacle-like limbs. Mischievous or menacing expression. Cartoon style.

nodes.label: Monster 3 Avatar (Yellow Octopus)
nodes.description: Cute yellow/golden octopus character with a round body, big eyes, and tentacles. Cheerful and friendly expression. Kawaii cartoon style.

nodes.label: Monster 4 Avatar (Brown Blob Monster)
nodes.description: Chubby brown/terracotta round-bodied monster with small arms, stubby legs, and a slight fang visible. Pudgy and endearing cartoon style.

nodes.label: Monster 5 Avatar (Green Horned Monster)
nodes.description: Large green monster with a wide oval body, three eyes, two white horns on top, and arms raised in a surprised or excited pose. Open mouth showing teeth. Cartoonish fun design.

nodes.label: Monster 6 Avatar (Red Round Monster)
nodes.description: Round bright red/orange-red monster with a big open smile showing white teeth, arms raised wide in a joyful or excited pose. Simple cheerful cartoon design.

nodes.label: Monster 7 Avatar (Dark Grey Fuzzy Creature)
nodes.description: Small dark grey fuzzy/fluffy creature with tiny legs, small eyes, and a timid or sleepy expression. Resembles a dark furball or baby creature. Cute understated design.

nodes.label: Monster 8 Avatar (Purple Round Monster)
nodes.description: Round purple/violet monster with a wide dark body, small horns, and hands on hips in a confident or sassy pose. Dark and slightly imposing but cartoonish design.

nodes.label: Monster 9 Avatar (Dark Squid/Cthulhu Monster)
nodes.description: Dark black/very dark brown elongated oval-bodied creature with red eyes and multiple tentacles hanging below. Resembles a squid or Cthulhu-like entity. Ominous cartoon design.
